title: Abnormals Bushy Leaves
description: A resource pack that adds bushy leaves compat to Abnormals Mods | 1.20.1
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/2ZFSrKt.png) Have you ever wondered, man I wish my Abnormals leaves were bushier? Guess what, introducing Abnormals Bushy Leaves! This adds bushy leaves support for vanilla and Abnormals Mods.

* **Works in fast graphics** * **Has ambient occlusion** * **No z-fighting**

![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/sOamJLk.png)

 


**🔧 Works Best With:** * [Cull Less Leaves Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves-reforged) **📦 Compatibility:** * [Atmospheric](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospheric) * [Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity) * [Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental) * [Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic)
